message:
fix(lint): resolve pre-existing clippy backlog blocking all agents (asupersync-1xekl)

- transport/stream.rs: hoist test-local use/struct/impl to module level
  (items_after_statements)
- net/websocket/split.rs: extract lock values before assert macros
  (significant_drop_tightening, uninlined_format_args)
- runtime/blocking_pool.rs: replace unused Vec with _handle bindings
  (collection_is_never_read)

All quality gates pass: clippy, check, fmt, targeted tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
